title: Peachy Solo-Sweet
description: A savory and slightly peppery vegan Brazilian dish featuring infused peach juice in a sous-vide setting for an elegant solo dinner experience.

ingredients.name: Peaches
ingredients.notes: Use fresh or frozen, thawed if using frozen

ingredients.name: Paprika
ingredients.notes: Optional, adds a slight peppery flavor

instructions: Prepare peach filling by peeling and pitting the peaches. Mince finely with salt and paprika (optional).
Place prepared peaches in a sous-vide bag along with water. Seal tightly.
Set up your sous-vide machine at an internal temperature of 60°C (140°F) for 3 hours.
Remove from sous-vide, let cool slightly before using peach mixture as a base for a vegan-friendly dish such as grilled cheese or vegetable skewers.
Serve the Peachy Solo-Sweet on its own or with a side salad for a complete meal.
